PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROJAS, GONZALO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARDTTMAN, THOMAS $3,553.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,553.50, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TAKE NOTHING FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ROJAS, GONZALO ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
